title: pothos hermaphroditus
intro: Pothos hermaphroditus, also known as the Gold Dust Pothos or Epipremnum aureum var. aureum, is a rare and unique variety of the Pothos plant that has golden variegation on its leaves. The leaves and roots of the Pothos hermaphroditus plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant is also believed to have health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure and improving respiratory health, due to its antispasmodic and expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the Pothos hermaphroditus plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
